task: Confirm controlling input register and assignment brief
acceptance_evidence: Controlling files, decisions, standards, and open questions are listed

task: Create protected native working set and record source state
acceptance_evidence: Working copies are isolated and confidential originals remain unchanged

task: Apply confirmed title block, sheet numbers, and project fields
acceptance_evidence: Sheet identity and issue fields match the assignment brief

task: Map layers, text styles, dimension styles, tags, and lineweights
acceptance_evidence: Required styles exist and exceptions are recorded

task: Validate units, insertion scale, project north, xrefs, and source-view rotations
acceptance_evidence: Units, scale, north, rotations, and xref state are explicit

task: Establish layouts, viewports, page setup, and baseline check plot
acceptance_evidence: Sheet size, viewport scale, and plot path are reproducible

task: Reconcile exterior footprint, wall topology, and closed boundaries
acceptance_evidence: Boundary is closed and conflicts are logged

task: Draft and tag doors, windows, and openings
acceptance_evidence: Every visible opening is placed, tagged, or marked unresolved

task: Draft rooms, stairs, fixtures, equipment, and observed context
dependency: Confirmed room names and supported evidence
acceptance_evidence: Unsupported labels and concealed conditions remain explicit

task: Add dimensions, area boundaries, labels, and notes
acceptance_evidence: Dimension strings close and area basis is stated

task: Run sheet self-check and resolve drafting defects
acceptance_evidence: No known gaps, duplicates, orphan tags, or unresolved silent conflicts

task: Develop confirmed wall, partition, circulation, and room geometry
acceptance_evidence: Plan reflects only confirmed direction and aligns to the existing base

task: Place kitchen, cabinet, appliance, island, and furniture content
acceptance_evidence: Content is sourced, controlled, and coordinated to the confirmed layout

task: Coordinate openings, deck, stairs, railings, and transitions
acceptance_evidence: Connections are coordinated without structural or code certification claims

task: Add dimensions, tags, notes, and proposal area graphics
acceptance_evidence: Graphics clearly distinguish existing and proposed conditions

task: Run sheet self-check and resolve drafting defects
acceptance_evidence: No known coordination, tagging, or geometry defects remain

task: Establish non-survey base, orientation, footprint, and drawing basis
acceptance_evidence: Basis and limitations are visible and do not imply survey services

task: Draft footprint, drive, walk, work limits, and agreed context
acceptance_evidence: Agreed elements are shown and unsupported geometry is not invented

task: Build area diagrams, closed polylines, and calculation labels
acceptance_evidence: Area classes, units, exclusions, and source basis are explicit

task: Add north reference, labels, dimensions, notes, and legend
acceptance_evidence: Orientation and non-survey limitations are readable

task: Run sheet self-check and resolve drafting defects
acceptance_evidence: No known closure, label, or graphic hierarchy defects remain

task: Cross-check shared geometry, orientation, dimensions, areas, tags, and revisions
acceptance_evidence: Shared controls agree or discrepancies are documented

task: Run native open, dependency, viewport, page setup, and plot QA
acceptance_evidence: Native files open and check PDFs plot through the controlled workflow

task: Assemble and inspect the coordinated check-set package
acceptance_evidence: Package names, sheet order, revisions, and issue state are correct

task: Issue check set with one-response review instructions
acceptance_evidence: BDPC receives one controlled package and consolidated-response guidance

task: Triage one consolidated BDPC review response
acceptance_evidence: Every comment is assigned, clarified, accepted, or routed to change control

task: Incorporate included review revisions
acceptance_evidence: Authorized comments are incorporated and tracked

task: Run final native, plot, coordination, and package QA
acceptance_evidence: Final native and PDF package passes the applicable acceptance checks

task: Issue final package, change summary, and unresolved-condition record
dependency: Final QA passed and final payment due
acceptance_evidence: Controlled deliverables and closeout record are issued together

task: Resolve in-scope evidence, geometry, or standards conflicts
acceptance_evidence: Use is recorded against a named issue; unused time is not converted to extra scope

task: Recover from in-scope runtime or dependency friction
acceptance_evidence: Resolution is documented or escalated before the ceiling is exceeded
